A LITTLE SOMETHING FROM MY HEART

A Letter For My Dearest Areesha ❤️

Some feelings are difficult to say out loud... so I decided to write them down instead.

My Dearest Areesha,

I just want you to know how much you mean to me. Since you came into my life, every day has become brighter and happier. Your smile brings me peace, and your love gives me strength.

Thank you for always being there for me. I promise to respect you, support you, and cherish every moment we share together.

I love you more than words can say, Areesha, and I'm grateful to have you in my life. I hope we continue making beautiful memories together.

Forever Yours ❤️
THE STORY OF US

Our Story ❤️

📸

The beginning of us ❤️

Some stories begin with a grand moment.

Ours began with something much simpler... a classroom, a few quiet glances, and feelings I never had the courage to say.

01 — BEFORE YOU KNEW

I Noticed You First

From the very beginning, I had a crush on you, Areesha. You had no idea, but I was always finding little excuses just to see you.

Every time you walked into the room, my eyes would naturally find you. I noticed your smile, the way you talked, the way you laughed, and even the little habits you probably never thought anyone noticed.

02 — THE LITTLE THINGS

You Stood Out Without Trying

There was something about you that felt different. You never had to try to get my attention because somehow, you already had it.

Even when I was pretending not to look, I was probably still noticing you.

03 — THE SECRET I KEPT

I Never Had The Courage To Say It

I wanted to talk to you. I wanted to tell you how I felt. But somehow, every time I thought about saying something, I lost the courage.

So I kept my feelings to myself and convinced myself that maybe they would always remain a secret.

THE MOMENT EVERYTHING CHANGED

Then You Messaged Me

One simple Instagram message... and suddenly, the story I never expected began.

04 — SOMETHING NEW

A Simple Conversation

What started as a casual conversation slowly became something I looked forward to more and more.

We talked, laughed, shared things about ourselves, and with every conversation, I felt myself getting closer to you.

05 — SOMEHOW, WE GOT CLOSER

Friendship Became Something More

The more I got to know you, the more I realized that my feelings were not going away.

If anything, I was falling for you even more.

06 — WHERE WE ARE NOW

The Girl I Admired

Looking back now, it still amazes me how one small message brought us so close.

The girl I once secretly admired from a distance became one of the most important people in my life.

Sometimes the most beautiful stories begin with the simplest moments.

And if I could go back to the very beginning...

I would still choose you. Every single time. ❤️

THE LITTLE THINGS I LOVE ABOUT YOU

What I Love Most About You ❤️

Areesha, I don't think I could ever choose just one thing that I love about you.

Because somehow, it's always the little things that stay with me the most.

THE THING I LOVE MOST

The Way You Make Me Feel

With you, I feel understood, supported, and genuinely happy. You have this way of making ordinary conversations feel special and ordinary days feel a little brighter.

Your Smile

I love your smile because it can completely change my mood. And honestly... when I know I am the reason behind it, I probably like it even more. Just a little bit. 😉

The Way You Look At Me

Sometimes you look at me and I completely forget what I was about to say. I don't know if you realize the effect you have on me, but honestly, you really should.

Your Laugh

I love the way you laugh, especially when something isn't even that funny but you still find it hilarious. I could probably listen to you laugh at the same silly things again and again.

Your Little Habits

The little things you probably don't even notice about yourself are often the things I find myself remembering later.

The Way You Are

I love your honesty, your loyalty, your confidence, your softness, and the way you stay true to yourself. You don't have to try to be special, Areesha. You just are.

The Way You Make Me Miss You

I love how somehow you can make me miss you even after we have just finished talking. Honestly, I don't know how you do that... but I am not complaining. Not even a little. ❤️

And maybe the most dangerous thing about you is that the more I get to know you, the more reasons you give me to like you. 😉

A FUTURE I IMAGINE WITH YOU

Our Journey Together ❤️

When I think about our future, I don't just imagine the next few months.

I imagine all the little moments that could make a lifetime feel beautiful.

I don't dream about a perfect life.
I dream about an ordinary life
that feels special because you're in it.

I want to hold your hand through every stage of life. I want to be there when you achieve the things you've worked hard for, and I want to be the person you can turn to when life doesn't go exactly as planned.

I want us to celebrate the big moments, but I also want to remember the small ones—the random conversations, the unexpected laughs, and the ordinary days that somehow become special simply because we spent them together.

I hope that one day we can build a home filled with love, respect, peace, and laughter. A place where we can be completely ourselves and create memories we will still talk about years later.

01 — THE LIFE I IMAGINE

Choosing Each Other

Life will not always be perfect. But I hope that no matter what happens, we continue to choose patience, honesty, understanding, and each other.

02 — THE HOME I DREAM ABOUT

A Place Full Of Us

Not a perfect home. Just a home filled with our conversations, our laughter, our memories, and the kind of peace that comes from being with the right person.

03 — THE MEMORIES I WANT

The Little Things

Traveling together, celebrating birthdays, taking random pictures, laughing at things only we understand, and collecting memories that belong only to us.

04 — THE PROMISE I WANT TO KEEP

Always Being There

I want to respect you, listen to you, support your dreams, and remind you how special you are—even on the days when you forget it yourself.

My prayer is simple: may Allah guide us toward what is best for us and, if it is written for us, unite us in marriage and bless our future with peace, happiness, and endless love.

No matter where life takes us, my heart hopes that our journey will always be together.

FRAMES OF A LOVE STILL BEING WRITTEN

Our Memories, Areesha ❤️

Some pictures are more than pictures, Areesha. They are proof that you smiled because of me, that these moments really happened, and that somewhere in the middle of an ordinary day, you quietly became my favorite memory.

The smile that changed my day

Your eyes I keep getting lost in

Just you, being effortlessly you

A quiet moment I never want to forget

The girl who became my whole story

Forever my favorite face

Every picture here is just a small piece of you... but somehow, every piece feels like home. ❤️

FROM MY HEART

One Last Thing, Areesha... ❤️

❤️

Tum meri zindagi mein kisi shor ki tarah nahi aayi,

tum ek khamosh dua ki tarah aayi ho—

aur phir dheere dheere,

meri har khushi ka hissa ban gayi.

Tumhare saath mujhe mohabbat ka matlab samajh aaya—

sirf kisi ko paana nahi, balki kisi ko samajhna,

uski khamoshiyon ko mehsoos karna, aur har din usi insaan ko dobara chunna.

Agar zindagi ek lamba safar hai, toh mujhe manzil ki jaldi nahi...

Bas tum mere saath chalti rehna.

Kuch raaste aasaan honge, kuch mushkil bhi.

Lekin meri sabse khoobsurat khwahish yahi hai— ke har mod par, jab main tumhari taraf dekhoon, toh tum mere saath ho.

Areesha, meri kahani ka sabse khoobsurat hissa tum ho.

Aur agar mujhe zindagi ki kitaab ka agla safha khud likhne ka mauqa mile, toh main us safhe par bhi tumhara naam likhunga. ❤️

Thank you for being such a beautiful part of my life.

I don't know exactly what the future holds, but I know that I am grateful for the story we have already begun.

Forever Yours,
Haris ❤️
